_comment_1: Allowlist of WooCommerce default strings whose translation may legitimately repeat across every theme without `check_wc_microcopy_distinct_across_themes` flagging the duplicate. Use sparingly — every entry here is a microcopy slot the family stops differentiating on.
_comment_2: Add a key to this file ONLY when the WC default is a tiny utility verb, a financial label, or a single-word UI affordance where artificial divergence would read as forced (Cart subtotal -> Subtotal everywhere; Login -> Sign in everywhere). The rule of thumb: would a real Apple / Aesop / Hermès store really say something different here? If yes, rewrite the offending theme's map. If no, allowlist it.
_comment_3: Keys are the WC default string verbatim (case-sensitive, exact whitespace). Values are a one-line rationale so future readers can audit the call.
Apply: Universal cart action verb; no shop has ever wanted 'Activate coupon' or similar.
Apply coupon: Same as 'Apply' — utility verb on the coupon field.
Be the first to review: PDP empty-state prompt; no theme has shipped a distinctive rewrite yet, intentionally left identical until one wants to differentiate.
Cart subtotal: Financial label collapsed to 'Subtotal' across every premium reference (Apple, Aesop, Hermès, Lululemon).
Description: Single-word section heading; every premium PDP labels it 'Description'.
Log in: Auth verb collapsed to 'Sign in' across every modern shop chrome.
Log out: Auth verb collapsed to 'Sign out' across every modern shop chrome.
Login: Case variant of 'Log in'; same rationale.
My Account: Account chrome label; 'Account' is the universal short form.
My account: Case variant of 'My Account'; same rationale.
Reviews: Single-word section heading; 'Reviews' is universal across every premium PDP.
Rating: Single-word label collapsed to 'Rating'; same rationale as 'Reviews'.
Subtotal: Financial label; every premium reference uses 'Subtotal'.
Total: Financial label; every premium reference uses 'Total'.
Update: Cart action verb; no shop ships a distinctive verb here.
Update cart: Same as 'Update' — utility verb on the cart-update button.
Username or Email Address: Auth field label collapsed to 'Email' across every modern shop chrome (case-insensitive).
Username or email address: Case variant of 'Username or Email Address'; same rationale.
View Cart: Mini-cart drawer CTA; 'View cart' is universal across every premium reference.
View cart: Case variant of 'View Cart'; same rationale.
Your rating: PDP review-form label collapsed to 'Rating'; same rationale as 'Reviews'.
